steps.title: Undo the subtraction
steps.content:
The equation is
$$
c-9=18p+k
$$
To isolate $c$, undo subtracting $9$ by adding $9$ to both sides.

steps.title: Write the equivalent equation
steps.content: Adding the same value to both sides keeps the equation equivalent: $$ c=18p+k+9 $$ This is the expression for $c$ in terms of $p$ and $k$. The answer is A.
